Streamline Statement Reference — Dutil / Above the Timberline / January 2026
=============================================================================
Source: Transcribed from product owner's reference shared in conversation.
The actual Streamline PDF for this period was not available via the API.
This text file describes the EXPECTED structure for structural comparison tests.

HEADER
------
  Title:   OWNER STATEMENT
  Owner:   Dutil David
  Address: (owner mailing address — not stored in Crog-VRS)
  Company: (company address)
  Badge:   APPROVED
  Property Group + Name: Above the Timberline

ACCOUNT SUMMARY
---------------
  Activity: From 01/01/2026 to 01/31/2026

                                        Period      YTD
  Balance as of 01/01/2026:             $3,001.91
  Payment Received:                         $0.00   $0.00
  Gross Reservation Revenue:                $0.00   $0.00
  Less Management Commission:               $0.00   $0.00
  Additional Owner Income:                  $0.00   $0.00
  Owner Charges/Expenses:               ($312.50) ($312.50)
  Total Balance Due:                    $2,689.41
  Payments to Owner:                  ($3,001.91) ($3,001.91)
  Balance as of 01/31/2026 (includes
    minimum required balance):           ($312.50)

PROPERTY BLOCK
--------------
  Property Group: Above the Timberline
  Property Name:  Above the Timberline
  Address:        638 Bell Camp Ridge (or similar — exact address from DB)
  Year: 2026  Period: 1

RESERVATIONS TABLE
------------------
  Columns: Res #/Type | Guest | Start | End | Nights | Gross Rent | Mgmt Comm | Net Amount
  Rows: (empty — no reservations in January 2026)
  Total: 0 | $0.00 | $0.00 | $0.00

OWNER PAYMENTS / ADDITIONAL OWNER INCOME
-----------------------------------------
  Columns: Date | Description | Amount
  Rows: (empty)
  TOTAL: $0.00

OWNER CHARGES/EXPENSES
-----------------------
  Columns: Posted Date | Type | Description | W.O./REF# | Expense
  Row 1: (date) | (type 1) | (description 1) | (ref) | ($200.00 approx)
  Row 2: (date) | (type 2) | (description 2) | (ref) | ($112.50 approx)
  TOTAL: ($312.50)

PAYMENTS TO OWNER
-----------------
  Columns: Date | Description | ACH # | CK # | Amount
  Row 1: (date) | (description) | (ach ref) | | ($3,001.91)
  TOTAL: ($3,001.91)
  Scheduled Payments: $0.00

OWNER RESERVE
-------------
  Balance as of 01/01/2026: $0.00
  Balance as of 01/31/2026: $0.00

KEY ASSERTIONS FOR TESTS
------------------------
  - Owner name contains "Dutil"
  - Property name contains "Above the Timberline"
  - Period: Jan 2026
  - Status badge: APPROVED
  - Opening balance: $3,001.91
  - Total charges: $312.50
  - Closing balance: ($312.50) — NEGATIVE, shown in parentheses
  - Payments to owner: $3,001.91
  - No reservations in table
  - Two charge rows in charges table
